name: nginx-proxy-manager
title: Nginx Proxy Manager
description: Full-featured reverse proxy manager with a beautiful web UI for managing SSL certificates, proxy hosts, redirections, and access lists. Includes optional MariaDB backend for production deployments.

variables.name: HTTP_PORT
variables.label: HTTP Port
variables.description: Public HTTP port for proxied services

variables.name: HTTPS_PORT
variables.label: HTTPS Port
variables.description: Public HTTPS port for proxied services

variables.name: ADMIN_PORT
variables.label: Admin UI Port
variables.description: Port for the Nginx Proxy Manager admin web interface

variables.name: NPM_DB_PASSWORD
variables.label: Database Password
variables.description: Password for the MariaDB database used by NPM. Leave empty to use SQLite instead.
